narrative:
Precinct Tully (precinct in Van Wert County) has 718 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.8 percentage points.
